name: rookidee
flavor_texts: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.
Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.
text: Rookidee is the Tiny Bird Pokémon. It is a flying-type Pokémon. Abilities: keen-eye, unnerve, big-pecks (hidden). Base stats — HP: 38, Attack: 47, Defense: 35, Sp. Atk: 33, Sp. Def: 35, Speed: 57. Evolution line: rookidee → corvisquire → corviknight. Lore: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit. Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.
